betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Industrial Steam Turbine§f

§aScale up your power generation — the most efficient turbine in the game!§f

The §bIndustrial Steam Turbine§f is a pseudo-multiblock machine and a much larger, more powerful version of the single-block Steam Turbine. It has §e100%§f conversion efficiency — the best of any turbine.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• 16×§f Steel Plate
§b• 4×§f Rubber Bar
§b• 2×§f Titanium Steam Turbine
§b• 4×§f Dense Gold Wire
§b• 4×§f High-Speed Steel Pipe
§b• 2×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Power Production per Stage§f:
§b• Ultra Dense Steam§f (150 mB/t) → §e18 kHE/t§f
§b• Super Dense Steam§f (1,500 mB/t) → §e27 kHE/t§f
§b• Dense Steam§f (15,000 mB/t) → §e30 kHE/t§f
§b• Steam§f (150,000 mB/t) → §e300 kHE/t§f

One full line of turbines produces §e375 kHE/t§f (7.5 MHE/s) and outputs §e1,500 mB/t§f of Low-Pressure Steam.

§6Operation§f: Maintain a 1:1 ratio of turbines for each density type. Has a ramp-up period when starting and a decay period when shutting down.

§eTip§f: This is the turbine you want for §bPWR§f and §bRBMK§f setups. Single-block turbines are fine for ZIRNOX, but larger reactors need the industrial variant for adequate throughput!
